heading: Right to abandon islands
label: 1419 Right to abandon islands
text: Nothing in this chapter contained shall be construed as obliging the United States to retain possession of the islands, rocks, or keys, after the guano shall have been removed from the same.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5578 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 164, § 411 Stat. 120
